title: Helictotrichon tibeticum
taxonomy: Helictotrichon tibeticum is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. This species is further grouped into the subfamily Pooideae and tribe Poeae. Additionally, it is classified as a genus within the tribe Poeae, specifically in the genus Helictotrichon. Helictotrichon tibeticum is a type of grass that belongs to the order Poales. It is native to the Tibetan Plateau and is often used as an ornamental plant due to its attractive foliage and flowering characteristics.
uses: Helictotrichon tibeticum, a type of grass, has been traditionally used in the Himalayas for its medicinal properties. intro: Helictotrichon tibeticum, also known as Tibetan oat grass, is a perennial grass native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas.
